title: Termite Treatment in Fordham, Bronx | $800-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Fordham, Bronx. Protect your home from termite damage with expert inspection & extermination. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Termite infestations pose a serious threat to Fordham homeowners, with these silent destroyers causing thousands in structural damage to the neighborhood's vintage brownstones and multi-family dwellings. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Fordham, from the historic blocks near Fordham University to the residential streets surrounding Fordham Plaza. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and proven treatment solutions to eliminate termite colonies and protect your property investment.
whyUs: With over a decade serving the Bronx community, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique termite challenges facing Fordham's diverse housing stock, from pre-war apartment buildings to newer developments. Our transparent pricing, thorough inspections, and guaranteed results make us the trusted choice for termite control in your neighborhood.
localContext: Fordham's mix of century-old brick buildings near Arthur Avenue and wooden-frame homes along the Grand Concourse creates ideal conditions for termite activity, especially in the humid summer months. The area's proximity to the Bronx Zoo and New York Botanical Garden, combined with aging infrastructure around Fordham Road's commercial district, means properties require vigilant termite monitoring and professional treatment to prevent costly structural damage.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Fordham typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand the scope of work before we begin.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Fordham homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows, mud tubes on foundation walls, and small piles of sawdust-like droppings. In Fordham's older buildings, you may also notice bubbling paint, warped floors, or visible damage to wooden window frames and door jambs.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Fordham can be completed in one day, though larger properties or severe infestations may require 2-3 days. Liquid barrier treatments typically take 4-6 hours, while bait station installations are quicker but require follow-up monitoring visits every few months.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite warranties for Fordham properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite warranties for all our Fordham customers, including annual inspections and retreatment if termites return within the warranty period. Our warranties are transferable to new owners, adding value to your property when you sell.
